report.summary: Cycle-close v6: 16 pages published today (all page.tsx verified), 2 new guides built (onchain analytics + crypto arbitrage) sitting in PUBLISH_QUEUE. 3 pages missing metadata exports, 42 TS errors unchanged, 738 uncommitted files, 7 days since last deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TODAY'S PAGES: All 16 pages published in batches 1-7 today have page.tsx files — no 404 risk.
METADATA GAPS: 3 of today's 16 pages missing export metadata (berachain-guide, celestia-guide, depin-guide). 13 of 16 missing JSON-LD structured data.
TYPESCRIPT: 42 errors in 2 files — unchanged from v5. Files: structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts), crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped >).
LEGACY DEBT: 103 published slugs lack dedicated page.tsx (served via dynamic routes or missing entirely). /trading and /compare/exchanges still 404.
NEW BUILDS: 2 pages built this cycle (onchain-analytics-guide-2026, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026) added to PUBLISH_QUEUE — ready for next promote cycle.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: Zero commits since last cycle, no code-level regressions introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTE FILES VERIFIED: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields — all have route.ts with proper GET handlers.

CACHE TTLs CONFIGURED: fear-greed (10min/s-maxage=600), trending (5min/s-maxage=300), market-metrics (60s/s-maxage=60), market-dominance (5min/s-maxage=300), prices (60s/s-maxage=60), defi-yields (configurable).
STALE-WHILE-REVALIDATE: All routes implement stale-while-revalidate at 2x their s-maxage — good CDN behavior.
ERROR HANDLING: All routes have try/catch with 502 responses on upstream failure. market-metrics returns mock fallback data on error.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/market-metrics route.ts exists locally but was never committed — still 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiting only on /api/health and /api/cache-stats. Core data routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields) remain unprotected.
LIVE HEALTH CHECK: Unable to verify — egress to degen0x.com blocked from this environment.

sections.title: DevOps
items: LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days since last deploy. No new commits this cycle.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 738 modified/untracked items in working directory — significantly up from 48 reported in v5 (includes new build artifacts and page scaffolds).
SITE STATUS: Confirmed LIVE in previous cycle (v5). Cannot re-verify from this environment (egress blocked).
DEPLOY RISK [P0]: 7 days of uncommitted work including core files (layout.tsx, globals.css, sitemap.ts, middleware.ts) and dozens of new pages. Single drive failure = total loss.
BUILD VERIFICATION: TypeScript check returns 42 errors (non-blocking for production build, all in examples file and one guide page).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 new learn guides built (onchain-analytics, crypto-arbitrage) — ~1,948 lines of content. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISHED TODAY: 16 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES across 7 batches (bitcoin-mining, ETF options, zk-coprocessors, ERC-7683, liquidation protection, wallet security, market cycles, vetokenomics, delta-neutral, berachain, trump-crypto-reserve, celestia, depin, layer-2-scaling, bitcoin-bitvm, crypto-market-making).
TOTAL PUBLISHED: 463 unique slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue: 2 pages ready to promote.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit and deploy. 7 days and 738 files uncommitted is unacceptable risk.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Add metadata exports to berachain-guide, celestia-guide, depin-guide before next deploy.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Commit /api/market-metrics route.ts to fix production 404.
CARRY-OVER: Fix 42 TS errors, wire rate limiters to core API routes, build /trading page, add JSON-LD to today's 13 pages.
